title: Starfall Visuals
description: Starfall is a Fabric client-side cosmetic mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 that makes glowing falling stars burst around entities when you hit them. Mod Menu, lets you tune size, speed, radius, glow, height, star count and colour.
body:
![The settings tab using modmenu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10e0d79513985b71346788a4a7faa150076e36dc_0.webp)
Starfall is a client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 that turns every hit into a dramatic burst of glowing falling stars. Instead of a quick particle puff, the effect is designed to feel more cinematic: stars emerge softly from the target, drift outward only a little, fall with weight, settle naturally, and fade after landing. The result is a playful, polished impact effect that works great for PvP, minigames, montages, and cosmetic-heavy gameplay without changing vanilla combat mechanics.

The mod is highly customizable through Mod Menu. You can adjust star size, speed, radius, glow strength, height cap, color, star count, and 3D rotation to create anything from tiny subtle sparkles to bright anime-style hit bursts. Color control lets you tune the stars to match a theme, team color, or personal style, and the visual settings are saved locally in a simple config. Starfall is also designed to be practical. It works in singleplayer and on multiplayer servers as a client-side visual effect, so the server does not need to install the mod for you to use it. I also want to mention, that the mod doesn't work with all high perfomance boosting mods, so if you have a problem that doesn't show the stars, this is probably why.
